variants.title: Bears smell food from miles away
variants.source_license: Derived analytics brief; new media required before render
variants.description: Watch the scent map behind this animal behavior: Bears smell food from miles away
variants.seo_title: Bears smell food from miles away
variants.yt_description: Bears smell food from miles away. Watch the scent map first, then replay the payoff.
variants.hook: Bears can smell a meal long before seeing it.
variants.script: Bears can smell a meal long before seeing it. Watch the nose first, because smell drives many bear decisions before the eyes do. That huge scent map helps them find food, avoid danger, and read who crossed the area earlier. Would you trust your nose that much?

variants.title: Foxes hear tiny prey under snow
variants.source_license: Derived analytics brief; new media required before render

variants.seo_title: Foxes hear tiny prey under snow

variants.hook: Foxes can hunt sounds hidden under snow.
variants.script: Foxes can hunt sounds hidden under snow. Watch the pause before the leap, because foxes can aim at prey they cannot see. Their ears help triangulate faint rustles under snow or grass. The jump is the last step of a sound puzzle. Would you hear it?
